description: A dramatic nocturnal landscape depicting a campfire burning brightly among dark pine trees in a rugged wilderness. A solitary figure sits silhouetted before the fire, which illuminates a makeshift shelter or lean-to. Tall pine trees rise as dark silhouettes against a turbulent sky with breaks of golden light from the setting or rising moon. The firelight casts warm orange-red light on the immediate surroundings while the rest of the scene is plunged in deep darkness. The mood is one of wild, untamed nature.
